name: chat_with_ai
description: Multi-modal AI chat agent with tool use, knowledge base retrieval, memory, TTS, dynamic context awareness, and support for multiple LLM providers with customizable system prompts and post-actions.
title: AI
author: ysnows

selection_text.description: The selected text from current active application

context_screen.description: The screenshot of the current screen

context_camera.description: The image captured by the camera

user_input_files.description: The user input files to be sent

preferences.name: prompt
preferences.description:
The system-level instruction that defines the agent's role and behavior. 

Supports [Nunjucks/Jinja2](https://mozilla.github.io/nunjucks/templating.html) template syntax. Use `{{ variable }}` to insert dynamic values, e.g. `{{ now }}`, `{{ input_text }}`, `{{ responseLanguage }}`.
preferences.placeholder: The prompt content helps set the behavior of the assistant.
preferences.title: Instruction

preferences.name: user_prompt_1
preferences.description:
The initial user message sent to the agent when it is invoked. Typically contains the user's input or task.

Supports [Nunjucks/Jinja2](https://mozilla.github.io/nunjucks/templating.html) template syntax. Use `{{ variable }}` to insert dynamic values, e.g. `{{ now }}`, `{{ input_text }}`, `{{ responseLanguage }}`.
preferences.placeholder: The prompt content helps set the behavior of the assistant.
preferences.title: User Message

preferences.name: working_directory
preferences.description: Workspace working directory. Sets the default base path for agent operations; if omitted, the default is used.
preferences.placeholder: The prompt content helps set the behavior of the assistant.
preferences.title: Working Folder

preferences.label: Message Count Limit
preferences.description: The maximum number of messages to be sent to the AI model

preferences.name: highlight_edits
preferences.description: Select to highlight edits. Useful for commands that edit selected text or other inputs like 'Fix Spelling & Grammar'.
preferences.title: Highlight Edits

preferences.name: dynamic_context
preferences.description: Dynamically get context info like opened window content, current screenshot, etc.
preferences.title: Dynamic Context

data.title: Dynamic Context
data.description: Dynamically get context info like opened window content, current screenshot, etc.

data.title: Disabled
data.description: No dynamic context will be gathered.

preferences.name: responseLanguage
preferences.description: The language used to force LLM to respond
preferences.title: Response Language

preferences.name: post_action
preferences.description: Configure actions to perform after receiving response
preferences.title: Post Action

preferences.name: required_parameters
preferences.title: Required Parameters
preferences.description: The required parameters

preferences.name: enable_memory
preferences.label: Enable Memory
preferences.description: Enable the agent memory system. When enabled, the agent can search and store memories about user preferences, facts, decisions, and other important information across conversations.
preferences.title: Enable Memory

preferences.name: used_knowledge_bases
preferences.description: The knowledge bases to use
preferences.title: Used Knowledge Bases
